name: python3-jupyter-core
title: python3-jupyter-core
summary: Core common functionality of Jupyter projects for Python 3
description:
Core common functionality of Jupyter projects for Python 3
This software component contains the base framework (application
classes and configurations) for the rest of the Jupyter projects ; it
doesn't do much by itself.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jupyter-core because Core common functionality of Jupyter projects for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jupyter-core as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jupyter-core with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jupyter-core --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
